M0750_CU_HOUSEKEEP (M0750) Current Housekeeping Current ability to safely and effectively perform light housekeeping and heavier cleaning tasks. 00 = (a) Able to independently perform all housekeeping tasks; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to perform all housekeeping tasks but has not routinely participated in housekeeping tasks
